creator: fernan@iib.unsam.edu.ar
text:
> > Because of the way I've set up all my FreeBSD boxes. I've
> > pretty much followed development(7) and have a central box
> > where all the distfiles are fetched. 
> 
> Then you might also want to set LOCALBASE=/nonexistant, so the central
> repository is not affected by what's actually installed on the box
> hosting it.

But then I presume that trying to install a port in the box hosting the
central repository (the one that has LOCALBASE=/nonexistant
defined) would fail ... or where would that port get
installed? /usr/local?

Fernan
